use_cases: Interactive button element for forms and call-to-action triggers
Reusable button with multiple visual variants for different UI contexts
Navigation and link trigger with hover and focus states
Form submission and action confirmation controls
ai_summary: A reusable button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority, offering multiple style variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Implements standard accessibility patterns with focus-visible ring states and disabled opacity. Meant to be composed into larger UI systems like pricing sections, forms, and navigation bars.
